title: Bump compiler for CI runtime bridge and ffi_v03 fixes

source.subject: chore(submodules): bump compiler for CI runtime bridge and ffi_v03 fixes

body:
## What shipped

Superrepo submodule pointer advances the compiler to pick up runtime-bridge e2e fixes and `ffi_v03` CI stabilization landed in the compiler repo.

## Source commit

Repository **`beskid`** · commit `8ba01c8`

> chore(submodules): bump compiler for CI runtime bridge and ffi_v03 fixes

## Completed

2026-05-24 (catalog cutoff window).
